description_long: This is a modern digital piano with a sleek, rectangular body and a full-sized keyboard featuring alternating black and white keys. The piano is supported by four sturdy, straight legs, giving it a stable and elevated stance suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban performances. The top surface is flat and glossy, with a control panel and various buttons and knobs visible above the keys, suggesting electronic functionality. The sides are smooth and angular, with no visible embellishments or decorative elements. There are no visible pedals or music stand attachments, and the back is plain, lacking any additional features. The overall design is minimalist and functional, emphasizing portability and ease of use in urban environments.
description: A sleek, modern digital piano with a full-sized keyboard, glossy black finish, and sturdy legs, designed for urban use. It features a flat top with electronic controls and a minimalist, portable design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, control panel, and sturdy legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile and depth of the piano, with visible keys and leg structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, featureless back and the full width of the piano.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the keyboard's length and the supporting legs.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard full-sized keyboard with alternating white and black keys, no visible missing or non-standard keys.
